name_for_human: sipi.bot — Spend Firewall for AI Agents
description_for_human: Pre-spend firewall for autonomous AI agents. Approve, block, or flag every agent transaction before money moves.
description_for_model: Use sipi.bot to evaluate whether an autonomous AI agent's proposed transaction should be approved, blocked, or flagged before money moves. The firewall checks against configurable spend rules: per-transaction caps, daily totals, velocity limits, merchant allowlists, category limits, time windows, and approval thresholds. Returns APPROVED, BLOCKED, or FLAGGED in under 5ms. All decisions are written to a tamper-evident audit log with a content-hash chain.
